---
title: "Inferenz Kategoriale Daten"
subtitle: "Statistik und Methoden der Nutzerforschung PY1802"
author: "**Prof. Dr. André Calero Valdez**"
date: ""
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "default-fonts", "imis.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      ratio: "16:9"
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r child="header.Rmd"}
```

---
class: inverse, center, middle
# .yellow[Binomial-Test]

---
# Binomial-Test

Inhalt folgt.

---
class: inverse, center, middle
# .yellow[z-Test]

---
# z-Test

Inhalt folgt.

---
class: inverse, center, middle
# .yellow[Chi-Quadrat-Test]

---
# Chi-Quadrat-Test

Inhalt folgt.

---
class: inverse, center, middle
# .yellow[Phi-Korrelation]

---
# Phi-Korrelation

Inhalt folgt.

---
class: inverse, center, middle
---
class: inverse, center, middle
## .yellow[ [Zurück zur Übersicht](index.html)]
